tasks.subject: Task 0: Add cryptography dependency
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Make `cryptography` available as a runtime dependency.

**Files:** Modify pyproject.toml (+ uv.lock)

**Verify:** `uv run python -c "from cryptography.fernet import Fernet; print('ok')"`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pyproject.toml", "uv.lock"], "verifyCommand": "uv run python -c \"from cryptography.fernet import Fernet; print('ok')\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["cryptography is a runtime dependency", "import succeeds"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Crypto & resolution core (credentials.py)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Encrypt/decrypt the credentials envelope (Fernet+scrypt) and resolve credentials per-key with lazy decryption.

**Files:** Create src/smoke_sense/credentials.py, tests/test_credentials.py

**Verify:** `uv run pytest tests/test_credentials.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/smoke_sense/credentials.py", "tests/test_credentials.py"], "verifyCommand": "uv run pytest tests/test_credentials.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["encrypt/decrypt round-trip; wrong pw raises InvalidToken; empty pw raises ValueError", "resolve prefers flags and skips get_password when all present", "resolve fills missing from file; absent file returns flags unchanged"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: credentials edit subcommand (bin/credentials.py)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add `smoke-sense credentials edit` ($EDITOR round-trip, re-encrypt) + shared resolve_password; register sub-app.

**Files:** Create src/smoke_sense/bin/credentials.py, tests/test_credentials_cli.py; Modify src/smoke_sense/bin/__init__.py

**Verify:** `uv run pytest tests/test_credentials_cli.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/smoke_sense/bin/credentials.py", "src/smoke_sense/bin/__init__.py", "tests/test_credentials_cli.py"], "verifyCommand": "uv run pytest tests/test_credentials_cli.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["edit on new path creates encrypted file from editor content", "invalid JSON leaves file unchanged, exits non-zero", "temp file removed after command"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: fetch integration (--end default, --credentials, resolve)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Make --end optional (default today), add --credentials, resolve credentials via core with lazy decryption.

**Files:** Modify src/smoke_sense/bin/fetch.py, tests/test_fetch_cli.py

**Verify:** `uv run pytest tests/test_fetch_cli.py -v` then `uv run pytest -q`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/smoke_sense/bin/fetch.py", "tests/test_fetch_cli.py"], "verifyCommand": "uv run pytest tests/test_fetch_cli.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["omitting --end writes file dated date.today()", "credentials resolved via core; no prompt when file absent", "existing fetch tests still pass"]}
```
